name: Wanka Online Inc.
summary: Wanka Online Inc. provides android-based content distribution services. The company offers DAPG Platform, a proprietary platform that enables marketers to distribute contents, such as advertisements, games, and videos. It also provides mobile advertising, online-video distribution, and game co-publishing services. The company serves marketers from industries, including brand owners, advertising agencies, mobile app and game developers, and video content providers. Wanka Online Inc. was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
